title: Supply Chain Manager - FM Logistic India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - FM Logistic India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!
